name: website-frontend
//overrides: firebase-admin@14 -> jwks-rsa@4.1.0 -> jose@6. jose@6 is ESM-ONLY ('type': 'module'),
but jwks-rsa loads it with `const jose = require('jose')` — a CommonJS require() of an ES
module. Node only tolerates that from v22.12/23 onward, so it works on a modern dev machine
and THROWS on Vercel's Node. The throw happens at module import of firebase-admin/auth,
before any route code, which is why it surfaced as an HTML 500 that no in-handler guard
could catch. jose@5 is the last release with a CommonJS build; jwks-rsa's usage is
compatible with it. Remove this override once jwks-rsa ships an ESM-safe import.
